info.name: SIBERMAS API Documentation
info.description:
SIBERMAS API Documentation

Sistem Informasi Bimbingan Pengabdian Masyarakat (SIBERMAS) REST API v1. This documentation covers all available endpoints for KKN management at UIN Prof. K.H. Saifuddin Zuhri Purwokerto.

Authentication

Most endpoints require authentication via Sanctum Bearer tokens. Use the `/api/v1/auth/login` endpoint to obtain your token.

Rate Limiting

API endpoints are rate-limited to prevent abuse. Exceeding limits will result in HTTP 429 (Too Many Requests) responses.

Error Responses

All error responses follow a standard format with success: false, error code, and message.

item.name:
GET /api/v1/public/home
Home page data. No auth required.

response.body: {"success":true,"message":"OK","data":{"featuredAnnouncements":[],"featuredDownloads":[],"stats":{"students":0,"groups":0,"locations":0},"aboutContent":{"visi":"Menjadi Lembaga Penelitian dan Pengabdian kepada Masyarakat yang unggul dan kompetitif dalam pengembangan ilmu pengetahuan, teknologi, dan seni yang berbasis pada nilai-nilai moderasi Islam dan kearifan lokal."}}}

item.name:
GET /api/v1/public/announcements
Published announcements, paginated. No auth required.

GET /api/v1/public/announcements/{slug}
Single announcement by slug. No auth required.

GET /api/v1/public/locations
All active locations. No auth required.

GET /api/v1/public/downloads
Active downloads. No auth required.

GET /api/v1/public/verify-certificate/{token}
Certificate verification. No auth required.

GET /api/v1/auth/captcha
Generate a new math captcha. Public endpoint.

POST /api/v1/auth/login
Authenticate user. Detects platform via X-App-Type header.

POST /api/v1/auth/logout
Logout user. Handles both token and session auth.

GET /api/v1/auth/user
Returns the authenticated user's data.

GET /api/v1/period-context
Returns the active period, available periods, and current phase.
